# present()

**Instance Method**

Displays the picker with no active selection for capture.

## Declaration

```swift
func present()
```

## Picker display

- **present(for:)**: Displays the picker with an already running capture stream.
- **present(using:)**: Displays the picker for a single type of capture selection.
- **present(for:using:)**: Displays the picker with an existing capture stream, allowing for a single type of capture selection.

items.description: Displays the picker with an already running capture stream.
items.name: present(for:)

items.description: Displays the picker for a single type of capture selection.
items.name: present(using:)

items.description: Displays the picker with an existing capture stream, allowing for a single type of capture selection.
